summary: IT Manager with 10+ years of experience leading enterprise ICT operations, infrastructure modernization, and cybersecurity governance across multi-site environments. Proven ability to align technology initiatives with business objectives while ensuring high availability, operational efficiency, and secure digital services. Experienced in managing enterprise IT infrastructure, hybrid cloud platforms (Microsoft Azure & AWS), and cybersecurity frameworks aligned with ISO 27001 and ITIL standards. Demonstrated success managing ICT budgets, optimizing vendor partnerships, and delivering scalable technology services supporting 1,000+ users across distributed organizations.
strategicImpact: Directed ICT operations supporting 15+ locations and 1,000+ users, maintaining 99.9% infrastructure availability.
Optimized vendor contracts and procurement processes, delivering 20% cost savings across multi-site operations.
Implemented enterprise Microsoft 365 and Azure collaboration platforms, enabling secure hybrid work environments.
Strengthened cybersecurity governance aligned with ISO 27001 standards, reducing system vulnerabilities by 30%.
Established proactive monitoring and disaster recovery frameworks improving incident response and resolution by 40%.
techEnvironment: Microsoft 365 · Microsoft Azure · AWS · Cisco Networking · Fortinet Security · Active Directory · SD-WAN · LAN/WAN Infrastructure · Endpoint Security · Backup & Disaster Recovery · Network Monitoring Tools · Virtualization Platforms

achievements.text: Lead enterprise ICT operations across 15 business centers, supporting 1,000+ users while maintaining 99.9% infrastructure uptime.
Serve as the primary ICT advisor to business leadership, aligning technology initiatives with operational and growth objectives.
Administer ICT budgets and vendor contracts, achieving 20% cost optimization through procurement efficiencies and vendor negotiations.
Implement Microsoft 365 and Azure cloud services enhancing collaboration, security, and productivity across distributed teams.
Strengthen cybersecurity posture through improved governance frameworks, endpoint security controls, and monitoring systems.
Implement proactive monitoring and disaster recovery frameworks reducing incident response time by 40%.
Lead and mentor IT teams across multiple locations, ensuring consistent service delivery and operational efficiency.
Led enterprise infrastructure deployments across 500+ sites, supporting national connectivity and telecommunications expansion initiatives.
Managed cross-functional teams of 15+ engineers and technicians delivering network and ICT infrastructure projects.
Oversaw multi-million-shilling infrastructure budgets and optimized procurement with OEM vendors including Huawei, Nokia, Cisco, and Ericsson.
Implemented proactive monitoring systems improving network reliability and reducing operational downtime.
Strengthened governance and compliance frameworks aligned with ISO standards and safety protocols across infrastructure projects.
Supported secure ICT infrastructure operations within a regulated government environment.
Assisted in enforcing enterprise security policies and access control measures across IT systems.
Contributed to governance and regulatory compliance initiatives across institutional ICT infrastructure.
Supported maintenance of mission-critical communication and surveillance systems supporting aviation safety.
Assisted in preventive infrastructure maintenance and technical documentation for operational continuity.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science – Telecommunication & Information Technology
